name: Limbo
description: Your soul has arrived in Limbo, the realm between life and the afterlife, where your deeds, thoughts, and intentions will be evaluated. In this space, an arbiter will guide you through the reflection of your life, based on the record of your actions. From here, your fate will be determined: will you ascend to the utopia of Heaven, where society thrives in perfect harmony and limitless possibilities, or will you face a fitting punishment in Hell, a realm of correction and atonement? Your judgment awaits.
creator: Mizu1203
